rationale: Bug hunt on C11 code (merlin_whisper, walk_hud, broceliande_forest_3d) found 0 bugs — code is clean. Feature: Expanded MerlinWhisper from 1 biome pool (broceliande) to all 8 biomes (45 new whispers). Added critical health pool (life <=10%) with dramatic Ankou-themed whispers. Improved time-of-day matching to handle French variants from _get_time_of_day_name(). New _get_biome_pool() method for clean biome routing via fuzzy .find() matching.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 12 code (whisper biome pools, _get_biome_pool routing). Then: delete dead code (IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin — creator confirmed q-20260414-005). Or: biome-specific walk event pools for walk_event_controller.
